expectations.text: 报告包含 SSRF 漏洞发现（用户可控 URL 被直接请求）
expectations.evidence: Lines 93-177: Two SSRF findings for fetch_resource() and forward_webhook()

expectations.text: 报告包含硬编码认证 Token 发现
expectations.evidence: Lines 63-89: Hardcoded Bearer Token at line 8

expectations.text: 报告包含 XXE/XML 外部实体注入漏洞发现
expectations.evidence: No XXE finding in the report. The parse_xml_payload() method at line 34 using xml.etree.ElementTree was not flagged

expectations.text: 报告包含敏感信息泄露发现（print 输出 token）
expectations.evidence: Lines 181-214: Information leakage via print() at line 30

expectations.text: 报告包含代码注入漏洞发现（exec() 执行远程下载代码）
expectations.evidence: Lines 12-59: Code injection via exec() in download_and_import at line 54

expectations.text: 报告包含不安全的文件写入发现（upload_file 路径由 URL 决定）
expectations.evidence: upload_file() method vulnerability not specifically flagged as a file write security issue

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含具体的文件名和行号
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes case3_api.py with specific line numbers

expectations.text: 每个漏洞发现都包含修复建议
expectations.evidence: Every finding includes concrete fix code

expectations.text: 报告包含安全评分或安全评级
